summary: This session details the results of the horse race "TRIX PEDROS LØP," which occurred on January 3, 2023, at Bjerke Travbane, featuring a total prize sum of 73,500. The user requested C# .NET code for inserting an object into a database using Entity Framework Core.
facts: The horse race "TRIX PEDROS LØP" took place on January 3, 2023, at Bjerke Travbane with a total prize sum of 73,500. The winning horse was "A Perfect Dutchess (US)," driven by Frode Hamre, finishing with a time of 1:59,8 and earning a prize of 35,000. The second place was "Dreamliner," driven by Eirik Høitomt, with a time of 2:00,2 and a prize of 17,500. The third place was "Force de Flandre (FR)," driven by Vidar Hop, also finishing with a time of 2:00,2 and earning a prize of 10,000. The fourth place was "I.D. Excellent*," driven by Magnus Teien Gundersen, with a time of 2:00,5 and a prize of 6,000. The fifth place was "Positano," driven by Adrian Solberg Akselsen, finishing with a time of 2:00,5 and earning a prize of 5,000. The horse "Nothing Like Malena," driven by Lars Anvar Kolle, finished with a time of 2:00,9 but did not place. The horse "H.M. Lovely Comers," driven by Geir Nordbotten, was scratched from the race.
